name: Enchiladas Verdes
recipeInstructions:
Calories per serving: 184 Fat grams per serving: 5
Approx. Cook Time: 0:45
In a large pot, boil chicken in water to cover until tender; reserve 2 cups broth.
Debone and dice the chicken. Add the chicken, tomatoes, onion, salt, and garlic to the reserved broth; boil for 10 minutes or until reduced enough for enchilada filling.
Strain the mixture.
Heat a bit of oil in a small skillet; press each tortilla into the hot oil for a few seconds to soften them and make them more pliable to roll. Stuff with chicken filling. Roll filled tortillas and place in a baking dish. Cover with salsa verde. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until thoroughly heated, about 25 minutes.
Before serving, top with sour cream.
Salsa Verde:
Boil tomatillos in a small amount of water until tender; blend in a food processor.
In a skillet, sauté onions in oil. Add the pureed tomatillos, salt, and garlic.
